mapper.select: SELECT grid.COLUMN_ID AS name, COALESCE(lang.LANG_DESC, grid.COLUMN_NM) AS label, grid.COLUMN_SIZE AS width, grid.COLUMN_ALIGN AS align, grid.COLUMN_HIDDEN AS hidden, grid.SORT_YN AS sortable, grid.FORMATTER AS formatter, grid.COLUMN_EDITABLE AS editable, grid.MAX_LENGTH AS maxlength, grid.SORT_COLUMN_NM AS sortColumnNm FROM DOCS_GRID_INFO grid LEFT JOIN DOCS_LANG lang ON lang.LANG_CD = grid.LANG_CD AND lang.LANG_TYPE = #{sessionLang} WHERE GRID_ID = #{gridId} ORDER BY COLUMN_SEQ ASC
